name: mostMsgGetSymbols
title: mostMsgGetSymbols
syntax: long mostMsgGetSymbols(mostAmsMessage * msg, char[] fblock, char[] function, char[] optype, long bufferSize); // form 1
long mostMsgGetSymbols(mostMessage * msg, char[] fblock, char[] function, char[] optype, long bufferSize); // form 2
description: Determining the symbolic Names of the function block, the function and the Optype from an AMS or control message using the XML function catalog.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message from which the symbolic names are determined.

parameters.name: fblock
parameters.description: Destination buffer for the function block name.

parameters.name: function
parameters.description: Destination buffer for the function name.

parameters.name: optype
parameters.description: Destination buffer for the optype name.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: Destination buffer size. Valid for fblock, function and optype!

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
